name: Kingdom of the Two Sicilies (1816–1861)
description: A white field charged at the centre with the elaborate Bourbon coat of arms of the Two Sicilies.
history: Flag of the Kingdom of the Two Sicilies, the Bourbon state of southern Italy, from its creation in 1816 until its annexation into unified Italy in 1861.

features.role: Bourbon arms of the Two Sicilies
